# Quickstart: LoadUp Frontend Development

**Generated by**: `/speckit.plan`  
**Date**: 2026-05-11  
**Feature**: 002-web-app

---

## Prerequisites

- Node.js 20+ (LTS)
- npm 10+
- The LoadUp backend API running at `http://localhost:3000` (or configured via env var)

---

## 1. Bootstrap the Project

```bash
cd C:\Users\dti-\Documents\LoadUp\frontend

npx create-next-app@latest . --typescript --app --no-tailwind --eslint --src-dir --import-alias "@/*"
# When prompted, accept defaults (App Router: Yes, src/ dir: Yes, import alias: @/*)

npm install styled-components @tanstack/react-query recharts
npm install -D @types/styled-components
```

---

## 2. Environment Variables

Create `.env.local` in the project root:

```env
NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:3000
```

> **Never commit `.env.local`**. It is already in `.gitignore` from create-next-app.

---

## 3. Project Structure (create these directories)

```bash
mkdir -p src/components src/services src/hooks src/styles src/types src/lib src/constants
```

Final layout:

```
src/
├── app/
│   ├── layout.tsx           # Root layout: ThemeProvider + QueryClientProvider
│   ├── globals.css          # Minimal resets only
│   ├── (auth)/
│   │   ├── login/page.tsx
│   │   └── register/page.tsx
│   └── (app)/
│       ├── layout.tsx       # Auth guard + BottomNavBar
│       ├── page.tsx         # Home / Dashboard
│       ├── training-plan/
│       │   ├── page.tsx
│       │   └── [dayOfWeek]/page.tsx
│       ├── train/page.tsx
│       └── progress/page.tsx
├── components/
│   ├── BottomNavBar/
│   ├── StatCard/
│   ├── ExerciseCard/
│   ├── MuscleChip/
│   ├── CalendarGrid/
│   ├── SeriesRow/
│   └── EmptyState/
├── constants/
│   └── strings.ts           # All UI strings (pt-BR)
├── hooks/
│   ├── useAuth.ts
│   ├── useTrainingSheet.ts
│   ├── useExercises.ts
│   ├── useSession.ts
│   ├── useCalendar.ts
│   └── useProgression.ts
├── lib/
│   ├── tokenStorage.ts      # JWT read/write
│   ├── apiClient.ts         # Axios/fetch base with auth header
│   └── queryClient.ts       # React Query client singleton
├── services/
│   ├── authService.ts
│   ├── userService.ts
│   ├── trainingSheetService.ts
│   ├── exerciseService.ts
│   ├── sessionService.ts
│   ├── calendarService.ts
│   └── progressionService.ts
├── styles/
│   ├── theme.ts             # darkTheme + lightTheme + AppTheme type
│   ├── ThemeProvider.tsx    # ThemeContext + ThemeProvider wrapper
│   └── globalStyles.ts     # Styled Components createGlobalStyle
└── types/
    ├── user.ts
    ├── trainingSheet.ts
    ├── trainingSession.ts
    ├── calendar.ts
    ├── progression.ts
    └── index.ts
```

---

## 4. Key Configuration Files

### `tsconfig.json` — ensure strict mode

The `create-next-app` output already has strict mode. Verify these are present:

```json
{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "strict": true,
    "noImplicitAny": true,
    "strictNullChecks": true
  }
}
```

### `src/lib/tokenStorage.ts`

```ts
const TOKEN_KEY = "loadup_token";

export const tokenStorage = {
  get: (): string | null => localStorage.getItem(TOKEN_KEY),
  set: (token: string): void => localStorage.setItem(TOKEN_KEY, token),
  clear: (): void => localStorage.removeItem(TOKEN_KEY),
};
```

### `src/lib/apiClient.ts`

```ts
import { tokenStorage } from "./tokenStorage";

const BASE_URL = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL ?? "";

async function request<T>(path: string, options: RequestInit = {}): Promise<T> {
  const token = tokenStorage.get();
  const headers: HeadersInit = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    ...(token ? { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } : {}),
    ...(options.headers ?? {}),
  };

  const res = await fetch(`${BASE_URL}${path}`, { ...options, headers });

  if (res.status === 401) {
    tokenStorage.clear();
    window.location.href = "/login";
    throw new Error("Unauthenticated");
  }

  if (!res.ok) {
    const body = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
    throw new Error(body.message ?? `HTTP ${res.status}`);
  }

  return res.json() as Promise<T>;
}

export const apiClient = {
  get: <T>(path: string) => request<T>(path),
  post: <T>(path: string, body: unknown) =>
    request<T>(path, { method: "POST", body: JSON.stringify(body) }),
  patch: <T>(path: string, body: unknown) =>
    request<T>(path, { method: "PATCH", body: JSON.stringify(body) }),
  delete: <T>(path: string) => request<T>(path, { method: "DELETE" }),
};
```

### `src/styles/theme.ts` (key tokens)

```ts
export const darkTheme = {
  colors: {
    primary: "#6750A4",
    primaryContainer: "#EDE7F6",
    primaryGradient: "linear-gradient(153deg, #6750A4 0%, #9c27b0 100%)",
    surface: "#1C1B1F",
    background: "#141218",
    onPrimary: "#FFFFFF",
    onSurface: "#E6E1E5",
    onSurfaceMuted: "#CAC4D0",
    onBackground: "#FFFFFF",
    onBackgroundMuted: "rgba(255,255,255,0.7)",
    glassOverlay: "rgba(255,255,255,0.15)",
    outline: "#938F99",
    error: "#CCC2DC",
    errorContainer: "#4A4458",
    success: "#A5D6A7",
    successContainer: "#1B5E20",
    // ... muscle groups
  },
  // typography, spacing, borderRadius, shadows as per data-model.md
};

export const lightTheme = {
  colors: {
    primary: "#6750A4",
    primaryContainer: "#EDE7F6",
    primaryGradient: "linear-gradient(153deg, #6750A4 0%, #9c27b0 100%)",
    surface: "#FFFBFE",
    background: "#F3EDF7",
    onPrimary: "#FFFFFF",
    onSurface: "#1C1B1F",
    onSurfaceMuted: "#49454F",
    onBackground: "#FFFFFF",
    onBackgroundMuted: "rgba(255,255,255,0.7)",
    glassOverlay: "rgba(255,255,255,0.15)",
    outline: "#79747E",
    error: "#7D5260",
    errorContainer: "#FFD8E4",
    success: "#386A20",
    successContainer: "#D3E8D0",
    // ... muscle groups
  },
  // typography, spacing, borderRadius, shadows as per data-model.md
};
```

---

## 5. Run the Development Server

```bash
npm run dev
# App available at http://localhost:3001 (3000 is used by the backend)
```

> Set `PORT=3001` in `.env.local` if Next.js defaults to 3000.

---

## 6. Build for Production

```bash
npm run build
npm start
```

---

## 7. Implementation Order (follow tasks.md)

Follow the task sequence in `tasks.md` exactly. The recommended order is:

1. Project bootstrap + tsconfig + env
2. Theme + ThemeProvider + global styles
3. Token storage + API client + QueryClient
4. Auth screens (login, register)
5. Auth guard layout
6. Services layer (all 7 service files)
7. React Query hooks (all 6 hook files)
8. Shared components (BottomNavBar, StatCard, ExerciseCard, MuscleChip, CalendarGrid, SeriesRow, EmptyState)
9. Home / Dashboard screen
10. Training Sheet screen + Day exercises screen
11. Workout Logging screen
12. Progression screen
13. i18n string constants (`strings.ts`)
14. Theme toggle (UI control + persistence)

> **Do not skip the service layer.** Components MUST NOT call `apiClient` directly — all calls go through services, consumed via hooks.
